title: Tricog Health - Telecardiology Platform
problem: ECG interpretation expertise is unavailable in many settings, particularly in emerging markets, delaying cardiac diagnosis and treatment.
solution: Cloud-based ECG interpretation platform combining AI analysis with remote cardiologist support, enabling rapid diagnosis anywhere.
technology: AI ECG analysis, telecardiology platform, cloud infrastructure, remote specialist review
target_customer: Primary care clinics, hospitals, clinics in emerging markets
ai_type: AI ECG analysis + remote cardiologist oversight
traction_signals: Strong presence in India and emerging markets
regulatory_notes: CE marked, regulatory clearance in multiple countries
varden_fit: VERY HIGH - Democratizes specialty cardiology access via telecardiology. Perfect model for Varden's specialty access mission in emerging markets.
notes: Excellent example of democratizing specialty care access. Strong emerging market fit.
